title: Upfit Panels for Exteriors & Soffits
shortDescription: A premium, unbreakable exterior ceiling panel. 100% waterproof and fire-resistant, perfect for balconies, roofs, and modern facades in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Upgrade your building's exterior and outdoor ceilings with Goals Floors' premium Upfit Panels. If you are tired of using heavy wood that rots or cheap plastic that breaks easily outside, this is the perfect and permanent solution.

Designed specifically for the harsh weather of Gurugram and Delhi NCR, these panels are 100% waterproof, fire-resistant, and virtually unbreakable. They are incredibly lightweight, which means they do not put heavy stress on your ceiling structure. Whether you are covering a balcony roof, an outdoor driveway ceiling, or upgrading a modern building facade, Upfit Panels give a clean, luxury finish.

Available in beautiful natural finishes and two different sizes (230mm for narrow lines and 305mm for a wider look), these panels offer premium architectural quality with absolutely zero maintenance.

features.title: Unbreakable & Flexible
features.description: Made from advanced high-strength materials. They do not crack or break easily, making them highly durable and safe for long-term outdoor use.

features.title: 100% Weather & Waterproof
features.description: Built to survive heavy rain, moisture, and extreme summer heat. They will never rot, swell, or grow fungus like natural wood.

features.title: Ultra-Lightweight
features.description: These panels are very light. They are easy to install and do not add unnecessary heavy weight to your roof or ceiling structure.

features.title: Fire Safe Material
features.description: Your safety comes first. These panels are treated to be fire-resistant, making them a very safe choice for your home and commercial buildings.

features.title: Zero Maintenance
features.description: You do not need to spend money on paints or expensive polishing. They keep their beautiful color and texture naturally.

features.title: Easy to Clean
features.description: Outdoor dust can be easily cleaned. Just wipe the surface with a damp cloth or wash it with mild soapy water to make it look brand new.

installation: The installation is fast, clean, and hassle-free. A basic metal frame (Aluminum or Iron) is prepared on the ceiling. The Upfit Panels simply interlock into each other and are screwed into the frame. We also provide matching edge corners (J-Trims and L-Profiles) to give your ceiling a perfect, professional border.
maintenance: It requires almost zero maintenance. To clean the outdoor dust, simply wipe it down with a damp cloth. You can even wash the exterior panels with mild soap and water without worrying about water damage.

faqs.question: What are Upfit Panels used for?
faqs.answer: Upfit Panels are premium decorative panels used mainly for outdoor ceilings (like balconies and roof edges) and building exteriors to give them a modern, wooden look.

faqs.question: Are they safe from Delhi NCR's heavy rain and summer sun?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely! They are 100% weather-resistant and waterproof. They are made to survive extreme heat and heavy monsoon rain without fading or rotting.

faqs.question: Will they break easily like cheap PVC panels?
faqs.answer: No. Unlike cheap, brittle plastic, Upfit panels are made from high-tensile materials. They are highly flexible and virtually unbreakable under normal conditions.

faqs.question: Can I use these panels inside my house?
faqs.answer: Yes! While they are strongly built for the outdoors, their premium finish looks beautiful indoors as well, especially for unique ceiling designs.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint or polish them?
faqs.answer: No, you don't need to paint them. They come pre-finished in beautiful colors and natural wood textures, saving you a lot of time and money.

faqs.question: Are these panels safe from fire?
faqs.answer: Yes, Upfit Panels are manufactured with fire-resistant properties, making them a very safe choice for both residential homes and commercial buildings.

faqs.question: How are they installed on the ceiling?
faqs.answer: They are installed very quickly. A light metal frame is made on the ceiling, and the panels interlock into each other and are screwed into the frame.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the 230mm and 305mm sizes?
faqs.answer: The 230mm variant has narrow design lines, which look great in smaller spaces. The 305mm variant is wider, providing a grand look for large ceilings and big commercial facades.

faqs.question: How do you finish the sharp corners and edges?
faqs.answer: We provide a complete set of matching accessories, including J-Trims and L-Profiles, to perfectly cover the edges and corners for a seamless look.

faqs.question: Do you supply Upfit Panels in bulk for commercial builders?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier. We offer special project pricing and ready stock for builders, architects, and interior designers across Delhi, Noida, and Gurugram.

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Frame
points: Create a light Aluminum or Iron sub-frame on the ceiling.
Ensure the gaps in the grid are evenly spaced.
Check with a leveler so the entire frame is perfectly flat.
installationSteps.tip: A perfectly flat frame prevents the panels from looking wavy.

installationSteps.title: Align the First Panel
points: Use a laser level or string line to make sure the first panel is perfectly straight.
Fix the first panel securely to the frame using screws.

installationSteps.title: Lock and Secure
points: Simply click the edge of the next panel into the groove of the previous one.
Drive a screw through the hidden lip to secure it to the frame.
installationSteps.tip: The screws are hidden in the joints, giving you a very clean, nail-free look.

installationSteps.title: Finish the Edges
points: Once all panels are installed, use matching J-Trims or L-Profiles to cover the corners and edges.
This hides all cut edges and gives the ceiling a professional border.
